description.ko: 무한한 공허의 영롱한 아름다움을 담아내며, 고요하고 미답의 심우주를 항해하는 보이드-3 정거장의 시각적 탐사.
description.en: A visual exploration of the VOID-3 station as it navigates the silent, uncharted territories of the deep cosmos, capturing the ethereal beauty of the infinite void.

prompt: Cinematic high-angle shot of the VOID-3 deep-space observatory floating in the center of a swirling violet and indigo nebula. Bioluminescent cosmic particles drifting in the foreground. Intense depth of field, hyper-realistic textures, stars twinkling in the deep black expanse of the universe, 8k resolution, sci-fi aesthetic.
